WebResource.Name: dodbl_dodbanner
WebResource.Description: Model-Driven App form OnLoad script. Reads dodbl_BannerEnabled, dodbl_BannerType, dodbl_ConsentExpiryDays, and dodbl_DoDConsentText environment variables via Xrm.WebApi, then injects the DoD consent modal or CUI classification CSS into the form. Register as a form library and add OnLoad handler: DoDBannerLibrary.DodBanner.onFormLoad (pass execution context: yes). Falls back to built-in defaults if env vars are unavailable.
